case_title: GENEVA DOS AMIGOS INC. VS. XO COMMUNICATIONS LLC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY GENEVA DOS AMIGOS INC. DBA GENEVA STEAK HOUSE AS TO DEFENDANT XO COMMUNICATIONS LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT XO COMMUNICATIONS LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2014 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL KIMIYAIE APPEARS AS REPRESENTATIVE FOR PLAINTIFF; MICHAEL PEREIRA APPEARS AS REPRESENTATIVE FOR DEFENDANT; HEARING HELD; NOT EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
AUTHIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF GENEVA DOS AMIGOS INC. DBA GENEVA STEAK HOUSE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -STAMPED SIGNATURE SERVED FEB-06-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT XO COMMUNICATIONS LLC.
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GENEVA DOS AMIGOS INC. DBA GENEVA STEAK HOUSE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT XO COMMUNICATIONS LLC. DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED BY THE COURT; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GENEVA DOS AMIGOS INC. DBA GENEVA STEAK HOUSE AS TO DEFENDANT XO COMMUNICATIONS LLC.
